name: 霸氣護妻宣言
name_en: Domineering declaration of love to family
description: 面對母親質疑他是否只是玩玩，Ryan直接回擊「我瘋狂地愛她」「我才是被她拿捏的那個」，在長輩面前毫不掩飾地宣告愛情，打破了「富二代玩弄感情」的刻板印象。

examples.drama_title: 💗No One Dared Kiss the Bully CEO—Until a Rural Girl Did,Then He Can’t Stop Spoiling Her!#drama #ceo
examples.excerpt: Who told you I was just playing around with her? I am crazily in love with her. Mom, I can't overwhelm her. I'm the one who has always been in the palm of her hand. Do you understand?
